title: platanthera stenantha subsp. omeiensis
intro: Platanthera stenantha subsp. omeiensis, also known as Omei's platanthera or Chinese platanthera, is a subspecies of orchid native to the mountainous regions of China. It has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant is believed to have several health benefits, including reducing fever, alleviating coughs and sore throats, and supporting respiratory health. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in teas or infusions, and its rhizomes can be dried and made into powder for use in supplements or capsules.
